case_title: BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. JEFFREY CHARLES FERMIN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $820.23 FILED BY BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT FERMIN, JEFFREY CHARLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $49.00) SERVED NOV-02-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FERMIN, JEFFREY CHARLES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERMIN, JEFFREY CHARLES $820.23 PRINCIPAL, $79.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $899.23 PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $150.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON JAN-02-2012 AND ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
